title: Reusable Editorial Portrait
sourceTitle: Premium Lifestyle Magazine Portrait Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable editorial portrait with controlled editorial portrait with distinct wardrobe, setting, mood, camera language, and refined color treatment. premium lifestyle magazine portrait. clean cover hierarchy with very limited typography. soft pastel bedroom editorial mood. natural face, hands, and fabric detail. Adult Subject: adult creative director with relaxed morning expression. Wardrobe: soft white shirt, loose knit cardigan, minimal jewelry, natural hair texture. Setting: cozy pastel bedroom seen from overhead with rumpled linen and small breakfast tray. Portrait Mood: quiet intimate lifestyle portrait, calm and aspirational. Camera Style: top-down or gentle three-quarter editorial photography, natural window light, soft shadows, high detail, simple stable hand pose. Palette: cream, blush pink, pale blue, and warm beige accents. Subject: Make adult creative director with relaxed morning expression the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in cozy pastel bedroom seen from overhead with rumpled linen and small breakfast tray. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use one dominant portrait image with clean magazine-cover spacing. Keep the subject large and elegant; avoid many tiny sidebar modules. Style and Rendering: Render in top-down or gentle three-quarter editorial photography, natural window light, soft shadows, high detail, simple stable hand pose. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use cream, blush pink, pale blue, and warm beige accents. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
